happy.microAdvice: Keep this good momentum for 10 more minutes with one tiny thing you enjoy.
happy.replyPrefix: You sound in a really good state.

sad.microAdvice: Start with your breath. No need to force yourself to bounce back now.
sad.replyPrefix: I hear that this feels heavy for you.

anxious.microAdvice: Anchor to this moment and do one small, certain action first.

calm.microAdvice: This rhythm works well. Keep it.

angry.microAdvice: Let your body slow down first, then decide how to respond.
